info.title: Tesla Fleet API
info.description: The Tesla Fleet API provides endpoints to manage Tesla vehicles and energy products, including vehicle commands, telemetry, energy site management, and fleet configuration.

post.summary: Controls grid charging and energy export permissions
Modifies backup reserve for vehicle charging during outages

get.summary: Provides site details including assets and settings
Returns vehicles belonging to the account
Makes live call to fetch realtime vehicle info
Returns whether mobile access is enabled
Returns all allowed drivers for a vehicle

post.summary: Provides information to determine vehicle state
Configures vehicles for fleet telemetry server
